Connect AI (free)
Get a free API key from console.groq.com/keys — free, no credit card needed. Sign in with Google, click Create API Key, copy and paste below.
Key is saved locally in your browser only.
Model:
Find model names at console.groq.com/docs/models
Paste your free Groq key above to get started. Once connected, I can summarise tasks, find overdue items, add or edit entries, and more.

Connect Google Calendar

✓ Google Calendar is connected. New entries with a deadline sync automatically.

If sync stops working (the access token expires after about an hour), click Reconnect to sign in again — or Disconnect to stop syncing entirely.

To get started, request the OAuth Client ID from the app owner, then follow these steps:

  1. Paste the Client ID in the field below
  2. Click Authorise with Google
  3. A Google sign-in popup will appear — approve the access
  4. Done! Your calendar will connect automatically

✓ Popup opened. A Google sign-in window appeared. Just approve access — this page will automatically detect it and connect. No copy-paste needed!

If the popup was blocked or something goes wrong, you can manually paste the token as a fallback:

Task Types

Add or remove types available in the entry form. Built-in types cannot be removed. Select a Google Calendar colour (1–11) to use when syncing.

Deleted entries are stored for 5 days before being permanently removed.
